_notes.gelatine_mass_ratio: grams of Gelatine Mass per 1 g pure gelatin (1 part gelatin : 5 parts water = 6)
_notes.suspicious_qty_grams: flag any single quantity above this many grams as a probable unit error
_notes.rescale_total_grams: auto-rescale every recipe so the gram ingredients sum to this (0 = off)
